author: GLDRoger
name: 10L Slide64 Mid6
blurb: 10-layer 1024-vocab tied-embedding run with sliding-window eval (1024/64), Muon 0.99 crossover schedule, fp16 tied embedding export, and int6 only on middle blocks 3-6. Final sliding-window exact score is from the quantized roundtrip artifact under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
